source_units.text_raw:
The DN zone includes many of the original '500 Lot Area' which are mostly residential in character in the Downtown periphery. Many of the narrow lots and small traditional homes still exist today maintaining the feel of the original town character at its founding. The zone also permits a range of semi, duplex, townhouse and small multi-unit buildings The maximum height is 3 storeys in this zone.
Rezoning from DN to the DMU may be considered where the intent meets the policies of the Official Plan.
The following uses are permitted in the DN Zone:
Lodging House
Multi-unit Dwelling
Medical, Health and Dental Office
Recreation or Fitness Center (indoors)
These uses are permitted so long as the following lot requirements are met:
(a) Lot Area N/A
(b) Frontage min. 10.6 m for any building type with 3 units or less, or equal to the side yard setback of the existing building on the abutting property, whichever is less
(c) Front Yard Setback min. 2.4 m max. 4.9 m
(d) Flankage Yard Setback min. 2.4 m max. 4.9 m
(e) Side Yard Setback min. 1.83 m,
(f) Rear Yard Setback min. 6 m
(g) Lot Coverage max. 80%
Permitted encroachments into the setbacks are listed in Table 3.2.
Short term rentals are permitted following the requirements of Section 4.10.
Neighbourhood convenience stores may be permitted if the following conditions can be met:
The total store floor area is less than 150 m2
There is parking for two (2) cars either off-street on the same lot, or onstreet within 100 m.
Any exterior garbage bins or dumpsters are fenced with a minimum 1.8 m high opaque timber fence.
Where a neighbourhood convenience store or associated parking/loading area directly abuts a residential use, the owner shall provide and maintain a continuous fence no less than 1.8 m high consisting of a wood fencing or masonry wall
One rear-yard or side-yard Accessory Dwelling Units (ADU's) may be permitted if the conditions in Sections 4.6 can be met.
Up to two (2) Attached ADUs may be permitted if the conditions in 4.5 can be met.
One primary building per lot is permitted.
The maximum building height shall be 3 storeys.
The maximum building dimension is 60 m.
The minimum Finished Floor Elevation (FFE) shall be 3.76 m CGVD28.
Attached garages are not permitted on the front of units in the DN Zone unless set back no less than 2 m from the front facade.
Townhouses shall have no more than 6 consecutive units in a continuous block.
Whenever possible new homes should include porches, pitched roofs, and cladding to match the neighbourhood context whenever possible. Max. Building Dimensions 80 m Max. Building Height 3 Storeys Min. Front Yard Setback 2.4 - 4.9 m Min. Frontage 10.6 m - 3 units or less
See Section 6.8-6.9
Curb cuts shall accommodate single-car access and the single-car width of the driveway shall be maintained until the driveway extends beyond the front facade of the primary building. Min. Rear Setback ~6 m Coverage 80% Min. Side Yard Setback 1.83 m

review_flags.description: PDF text order and figure/table text were extracted with pypdf; verify section order, column flow, and page layout before normalization.
The zone contains table, figure, or schedule text. Values are preserved as extracted text and require source PDF layout review before normalization.
